data.title: RED: Write failing tests for centrality caching and file count threshold
data.description:
## Description

Write failing behavioral tests for two features in record-test-status.sh:
1. Per-file per-diff-hash caching of centrality scores
2. File count threshold that skips centrality computation for large changesets

### Tests to write

1. **test_centrality_cached_per_diff_hash**: Run record-test-status.sh twice with the same staged files. Second run should use cached centrality score (verify via timing or cache file existence). Change the staged files (different diff hash), verify cache is invalidated and recomputed.

2. **test_file_count_threshold_skips_centrality**: Stage > 50 files (exceeding default test_gate.file_count_threshold=50). Verify the full test suite runs WITHOUT computing centrality scores. Check centrality-log.jsonl contains decision "skipped_file_count".

3. **test_file_count_threshold_configurable**: Set test_gate.file_count_threshold=5 in config. Stage 6 files. Verify full suite runs. Stage 4 files. Verify centrality is computed normally.

4. **test_centrality_cache_cleanup_on_hash_change**: Create cache entries for one diff hash, then change staged files (new hash). Verify old cache entries are cleaned up.

### TDD setup
- Add RED marker to .test-index
- Test approach: Each test creates isolated git repos, stages files, runs the hook, asserts on behavior

### File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh (modify — add 4 tests)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — RED-marked tests tolerated
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test_centrality_cached_per_diff_hash exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q 'test_centrality_cached_per_diff_hash' tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh
- [ ] test_file_count_threshold_skips_centrality exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q 'test_file_count_threshold_skips_centrality' tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh
- [ ] test_file_count_threshold_configurable exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q 'test_file_count_threshold_configurable' tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh
- [ ] test_centrality_cache_cleanup_on_hash_change exists in test file
  Verify: grep -q 'test_centrality_cache_cleanup_on_hash_change' tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh
- [ ] RED marker present in .test-index
  Verify: grep -q 'test_centrality_cached_per_diff_hash' .test-index
